problem_text_cn: 电子显微镜电子加速电压U=512 kV，加速后电子束进入非均匀磁场区沿轨道T运动。改装为质子显微镜时，以-U加速静止质子，要求质子沿相同轨道运动，求各线圈电流iₙ'与原电流iₙ的关系。
problem_text_en: The accelerating voltage for electrons in an electron microscope is U=512 kV. After acceleration, the electron beam enters a non-uniform magnetic field region and moves along orbit T. When modified into a proton microscope, static protons are accelerated with -U. It is required that the protons move along the same orbit. Find the relationship between the coil currents iₙ' and the original currents iₙ.
problem_solution_cn: （1）轨道重合条件：- 带电粒子动力方程q v × B = dp/dt，得dτ/ds = (q/p) τ × B（τ为速度方向单位矢量，p为动量常量）。- 电子与质子轨道重合要求dτₑ/dsₑ = dτₚ/dsₚ，即(qₑ/pₑ) τ × B = (qₚ/pₚ) τ × B'，因qₚ=-qₑ，故B' = -(pₚ/pₑ) B。（2）动量计算：- 电子：Eₖₑ=512 keV=mₑc²，pₑ = √3 Eₖₑ / c；- 质子：Eₖₚ=512 keV≪mₚc²，pₚ = √(2 mₚ c² Eₖₚ)/c；- 计算得pₚ/pₑ ≈35.0，故B'=-35.0 B。（3）电流关系：- 磁场与电流成正比，故iₙ' = -35.0 iₙ（负号表示电流方向相反）。
problem_solution_en: （1）Orbit coincidence condition：- The dynamic equation of a charged particle is q v × B = dp/dt，yielding dτ/ds = (q/p) τ × B（τ is the unit vector in the velocity direction，p is the constant momentum）。- The orbit coincidence of electrons and protons requires dτₑ/dsₑ = dτₚ/dsₚ，that is, (qₑ/pₑ) τ × B = (qₚ/pₚ) τ × B'. Since qₚ=-qₑ，we have B' = -(pₚ/pₑ) B。（2）Momentum calculation：- Electron：Eₖₑ=512 keV=mₑc²，pₑ = √3 Eₖₑ / c；- Proton：Eₖₚ=512 keV≪mₚc²，pₚ = √(2 mₚ c² Eₖₚ)/c；- Calculating gives pₚ/pₑ ≈35.0，so B'=-35.0 B。（3）Current relation：- The magnetic field is proportional to the current，so iₙ' = -35.0 iₙ（the negative sign indicates the opposite current direction）。
problem_answer: 各线圈电流关系为$i_n' = -35.0 i_n$（负号表示电流方向相反）
